programme.desc: A report on the separate disappearances in 2003 of three young women, and the investigations which not only eventually discovered the one individual who had known all three women, but led to his conviction as the killer of the three.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 7

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 50
programme.desc: A report about how serial killer Andrew Urdiales was identified, arrested and convicted, and about the young woman who became the only one of his victims to survive.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 44
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 62
programme.desc: A report on the 1980 murder of Marilyn McIntyre, who was found dead in her home. Her husband, Lane, had returned home from work that morning and found her body. As police checked into his alibi, he named his friend Curt Forbes as a potential suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 43
programme.desc: An examination of the story of Laura Hall, who was convicted and sent to prison for the crime of dismembering the body of Jennifer Cave in 2005.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 46
programme.desc: In June 2007, Dewayne Barrentine met Tausha Fields and soon after they began living together. Tausha told him some unbelievable stories about herself – leading Barrentine to verify her stories online, which resulted in the uncovering of a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 51
programme.desc: A report on the 2007 murder of Jennifer Turner, married but separated from Dr. Kirk Turner, due to his infidelities with the family banker, Tondja Colvin. Jennifer had filed for divorce and also brought an alienation of affection suit against Tondja.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In August 1996, Yvette Rodier and Zach Snarr went to the mountains for their date to take photos of the full moon, when a stranger drove up, pulled out a gun and opened fire. Zach was killed. Yvette, shot four times, survived by pretending to be dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 15

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, it's Sterling's time to shine as Rob quizzes him with a "Steelo Vision Test," the gang gets some "Trill Advice" and do all they can to avoid "The Brim Reaper."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to throw down some JAMMIES, check out the TONGUE CAM and experience some water pain in the category GETTIN' LAKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Teyana Taylor joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to pay tribute to KID NAPPERS, and tell us about BIRTHDAY ASSASSINS, and what it's like to be in a LUST BUBBLE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo dive head first into some DEAD POOLS, go into CARROT SHOCK and learn a valuable life lesson that EVERYTHING FARTS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy Award-winning duo The Chainsmokers join Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to cringe at some BITERS, ride STOLEN MATTRESSES and marvel at the magic of real-life TELEPORTERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, dedicated to the smart people who make our world a better place, Rob, Steelo and Chanel take a look at some lesser-known NERDACHIEVEMENTS, the dark side of science, with TRIAL AND TERROR

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 721
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have NASCAR's Chase Elliott talk about "Hall Of Fame Dads," suffer a "Victory Lapse," and get a helping hand from some "Personal Pit Crews."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 826
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling look for some "Everyday Peens", watch some videos get "Dog Bombed" and check out some people who have serious "Motor Skills".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes WWE Diva, Paige, to learn what it's like to be "Born Badass," watch some "Everyday Divas" throwdown and learn there's no better insults than some "Proper Smack."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, trick shot superstars Dude Perfect joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to enjoy some "Dudebrations", witness the pain of "Dud Perfect," and learn about the dangers of "Bad Garretts."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: On a new episode of Ridiculousness, actor and rapper Machine Gun Kelly joins Rob to celebrate "Wild Boys," fend off the "Fun Police" and learn you can never be too scared of "Sky Coffins."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, talkshow host Steve Wilkos joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some SURPRISE TITTIES, call STEVECURITY and watch the HIGHEST RATED CATEGORY EVER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 816
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling enjoy some "White Whines", attend an "Animals Anonymous" meeting and take a trip to the most dangerous suburb in the country "Slamburbia."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 829
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, stunt person and Nitro Circus star Jolene Van Vugt stops by to get destructive with "Smash Happy," capture the perfect monkey moments in "Right Place, Right Monkey,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 29
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Post Malone joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to ball with some REALLY WHITE IVERSONS, get messy with the category SAUCIN' ON YOU and show off some KNUCKLE TATS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 719
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, country music star Tyler Farr teaches Rob, Chanel, and Sterling the healing power of "Redneck Therapy," how-to "Suffer In Peace" and what it means to have "Outside Junk."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 819
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Super Bowl 50 Champs DeMarcus Ware and Von Miller join Rob and the crew to try out for the "Swat Team," round up some "Attack Chickens," and file to the IRS to become "Fart Tax Exempt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 802
programme.desc: Tonight on Ridiculousness, comedian Eric Andre returns to check out some "Power Dicks", watch people go tongue to tongue in the category "Unexpected Mouth Mates" and get sticky with his favorite dressing.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Olympic Gold Medalist Kaitlyn Farrington joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about "Other Sochi Games", "Pokeaphobia" and what it means to be a "Virgin Larper".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Nitro Circus stuntman, Andy Bell joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to take a look at some "Nitro Sideshows," take a look at the phenomenon of "Street Prancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 830
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Do you enjoy watching performers pushed into their discomfort zone? Thank God You're Here thrusts well known guest performers into a scenario they know nothing about, working with a cast who do know what's going on. Hosted by Shane Bourne.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual reenactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- An extravaganza of holiday songs are performed in unique South Park style, hosted by Mr. Hankey.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Worldwide Recorder Concert: The class visit Mr Garrison's hometown for a recorder concert, where they attempt to find the mysterious 'brown noise'. What part does Kenny G play in this? (S3, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Tooth Fairy Tats: Cartman gets $2 from the Tooth Fairy, which leads him to a scheme to buy a new videogame. It's not long before the boys are caught up in the black market tooth racket.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime: Things go from bad to worse for Cartman after he throws a rock at Token - it's jail time for this racist! Will the boys win the sled race without lardy on board? (S4, E02)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Commander Hoek and Cadet Stimpy's rocket hurtles out of control and leaves them marooned on an eerie uncharted planet, where they attempt to find food and avoid the hideous Brainiac men.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Spanky teaches Clara to step outside of her comfort zone, while Xandir and Captain Hero bond.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: An obsessive-compulsive giant ape needs a job, and Callie struggles with her sudden attraction to Twayne.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: Daria joins Jake on a business trip where he tries to court a big-name client, and Helen tries to bond with Quinn at a sleepover.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: Daria dreams up a murder mystery at her school after Kevin and the football team are suspected of cheating on a test.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Ren & Stimpy journey to the Blue-Cheese Mountains to become miners. After dealing with some savages, they finally reach the blessed mountains where they mine the cheese and dream of being rich.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark helps Leonard with his magic wand issues, and Twayne Boneraper meets his two-dimensional soulmate.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After winning a contest for Gritty Kitty Litter.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Callie goes baby-crazy when Mark fosters a demon orphan, and Twayne notices odd changes in his body.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Daria and Jane wonder if aliens have taken over their town after Secret Service agents urge the students at Lawndale High to report anyone who exhibits strange behaviors.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Grimes' judgmental mother rises from the dead, and a neglected Randall reconsiders his living situation.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: Helen agrees to help her niece with her divorce, Jake leaves home to escape Helen and Aunt Rita's bickering, Daria avoids Tom, and Stacy and Tiffany face a fashion dilemma.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Daria and Jane's friendship is tested when Jane dates an opinionated guy with a love for everything vintage, and Upchuck tries his hand at magic.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stimpy's stupidity becomes too much for Ren and he leaves home to become a hermit. All alone, Ren begins to go crazy because he misses his true friend.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy find themselves in elf and gnome world where everyone happily works to graduate Pixie status. Stimpy loves his new work, but Ren thinks it's too hard and everyone is too happy.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Randall is infected by horrifying plants at sea when Twayne throws a cruise ship party.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The situation grows increasingly dire for everyone trapped in the van, and Foxxy is taken captive.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Becoming a breakfast cereal mascot leads Wooldoor to fame and Crunch Berries addiction.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When Daria volunteers at a retirement home, she discovers that her tone makes her as unpopular with the senior citizens as it does with her peers.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Jake gets Daria a job after she reveals the result of her career aptitude test, Trent and Jesse attempt to write a new song, and Jane tries to save Daria from humiliation.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mark cares for an undocumented werewolf, and Leonard envies his famous magician brother, Christ Angel.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers move to Lawndale, bubbly younger daughter Quinn becomes instantly popular while her sarcastic sister Daria is told to work on her self-esteem.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Jane and Trent head to a Lane family reunion, and Helen decides to take the Morgendorffer's on a family camping trip for rest and relaxation.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The housemates rise up against the dreaded "Reality TV Twist."

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Daria struggles with Jane's unexpected desire to be on the school track team.

programme.title: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s prison while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners.

programme.title: Letting Go
programme.desc: Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past.

programme.title: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: Home Run
programme.desc: After a baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail and her brother search for the shooter.

programme.title: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation.

programme.title: Integrity Test
programme.desc: Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: A heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.title: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived, it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructure looming, Andy and Sam’s wedding lets the gang celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.title: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: A high-stakes takedown goes awry upon the revelation that rookie cop Andy McNally has busted one of her own.

programme.title: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt for an escaped convict, Swarek lets Andy in on his past undercover exploits.

programme.title: Fite Nite
programme.desc: The rookie cops duke it out for a cause at “Fite Nite.”

programme.title: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy trades in her uniform for something more risqué when she goes undercover as a prostitute.

programme.title: Broad Daylight
programme.desc: During a home invasion, Andy is left alone and confronted with a hiding thief who is armed and very volatile.

programme.title: All I Need Is You
programme.desc: Lou spearheads preparations for the big day while Amy throws herself into gentling a rescue horse.

programme.title: Written in Stone
programme.desc: To give Amy and Ty the wedding they really want, Lou struggles to deal with a slew of last minute hurdles

programme.title: Darkness Before Dawn

programme.title: Making the Grade

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 5

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 5

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tanya's sister chooses the restaurant for her wedding venue, and Mal's father-in-law is bent on making trouble.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 6

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It's the night before Jojo and Dylan's wedding, and Shane has lost the rings. Meanwhile, Jojo's transgression finally bubbles up to the surface.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jojo is in shock after being sacked. Could this be the wake-up call she needs, or is it too late?

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Geoff must decide whether to stay at Raw or return to Australia to take over the family restaurant.

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Commander Blake is assigned to investigate the bludgeoning death of an elderly woman as quickly and quietly as possible while DCI James' wife Zoe goes into labor.

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Brian believes that someone else was in the room with him when he found his mother's body. Commander Blake is forced to take extreme action to find the truth and accept the repercussions. Will they find the abductor of DCI James' baby?

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Did Brian kill his own mother in an alcoholic haze? Who stole DCI James and Zoe's baby? Clare feels the heat of two high-profile cases with personal connections.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Patient and persistent, Deputy Chief Constable Stephen Blackton (David O'Hara) has earned his nickname, "Blackdog,” as he is called in to re-open the investigation of the Lionel Cripps shooting.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.desc: Doreen and Franky masquerade as nuns to con people into giving them money.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 28
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is a bitter, prejudiced man. Through unknown means, he intends to shrink every evil person in the world at four o'clock.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 30
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 31
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 32
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 33
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 34
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 35
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 37
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A scientist creates an android that has the qualities which he feels he's lacking.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A US naval destroyer investigates a mysterious tapping sound coming from a sunken submarine.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl who lost her parents in a fire doesn't speak because she has grown up in a secret telepathic community.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jess-Belle enlists the aid of a local witch who casts a spell that makes Billy-Ben fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A three-man spacecraft lands on a planet only to discover the wreckage of a spacecraft identical to their own.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A reporter finds himself trapped in a small town where the people have extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a plastic surgeon when an actress's death apparently results from an infection contracted during surgery.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda are assigned to the task force investigating an airplane crash. An adversarial FBI agent and Russian mobsters make their assignment more difficult.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steve and Ron lead the chase for the stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The Sloans run into plenty of industry politics when they investigate the death of television network executive, Rachel Woodrall. Seamy revelations about Woodrall's college sorority lead to the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Jesse finally reunites with his father. After they narrowly elude an assassin, Jesse begins to realize his father isn't the accountant he's always claimed to be, but rather a spy. The Travis's attempt to discover who's sending the killers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A dead mime leads to an investigation of a crooked auto dealer. Randy Wolfe, a woman who's apparently an expert at everything, leads the investigation while continually annoying Steve.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A motorcycle stunt driver has a fatal accident while filming an action video. Steve investigates.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: When Steve is shot and falls into a coma, Mark does all in his power to find the assailant, even threatening a suspect with bodily harm.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: This episode takes place four months after Mark was convicted of murder. Steve is slowly recovering from his wounds and Mark is still rotting in prison.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A hospital emergency preparedness drill turns deadly when an unpopular and ambitious nurse is found dead amid the chaos with an eccentric artist the only witness.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Chloe has her first ever bikini wax in preparation for Sam’s hot tub party. Sam’s hot tub gets lots of action in her at her housewarming party. Mick takes Arg, Mario, Joey and Diags to his beach-side caravan for a boys night away and some sea air.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lydia and Arg’s relationship takes another unexpected turn. Billi and Cara hold an EsSex and the City themed Valentines Day party. Billi bags herself a Valentines kiss.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mario’s stream of surprises for Lucy continues as he proves the way to an Essex girl’s heart is through a tiny dog. Sam and Billie show Gemma the latest solution for a camel-toe.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nanny Brighton comes to stay in a bid to help brighten Arg’s spirits. Chloe, Lauren Pope and Georgina toss some Essex style Pancakes. Best Friends Cara and Billi have an awkward chat about Billi’s feelings for Tom.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey, Diags, Arg and Frankie have an action-packed afternoon rope swinging and grass sledding. Lauren Pope recovers from her breast implant operation and Dr. Russo pays her a bedside visit. Gemma has a first date with a new mystery man.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It’s the series finale. Mario throws a fancy dress party to celebrate his birthday. Joey and Ricky sort out their differences. Jess and Lauren come face to face at Mario’s party. With a choice of girls, which one will Ricky chose?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Essex gang are in shock as Arg shows off his new skinny look in preparation for the London Marathon. Gemma is faced with more worries about Charlie when she realises there is no passion between the pair.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey’s Reem night relaunches with a bang. Cara and Mick spend the day together- on segways. Gemma tells all about her titanic date with Charlie. Arg trains for the marathon.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With less than a week to go before the marathon, Arg, Billi and Cara continue their training, with the help of Ricardo. Mario and Ricky rib Little Chris over his failed attempt at chatting up Frankie. Gemma has a clothing line launch.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Billi, Cara and Arg recover after completing the London marathon. Chloe and the girls take her daughter to the farm for her birthday. Lucy and Mario celebrate their one year anniversary.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s Mick’s birthday and he’s throwing a party Vegas Style – everyone is going. Sam, Billie, Gemma and Lucy try out Pole Dancing. Mario takes Little Chris to get his chest waxed.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam throws a dinner party for all of the ‘couples’. We meet Gemma’s new mystery man Rami. Tom P and Lauren P go on a date to a vineyard- will he do enough to impress her?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: There’s a new girl on the block. The girl Tom K has been texting is revealed and there are a few unhappy campers. We find out the goss after Lauren P’s and Tom P’s snog. Joey’s in trouble with Sam. Nanny Pat gets new dentures.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey thinks he might have made a mistake by dumping Sam, but is it too late? Lucy does a photoshoot for her new swimwear range. It’s the launch night of Bobby’s brand new hairdressing Academy. The tension simmers between Gemma and her ex Charlie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The rivalry between the boys escalates and Diags is determined to confront Mario. Lauren comes face-to-face with Tom P questioning him over his decision to choose Lauren P over her. Gemma apologizes to Bobby for ruining his open night.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 903
programme.desc: The Geordies head to Paris for a Tash-on Tours job. Vicky gets unprofessionally mortal at work, and, on returning to the Toon, Charlotte leaves for crisis talks with her boyfriend. (S9, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Charlotte and Gary find themselves gravitating together after she returns from a showdown with her boyfriend. Vicky struggles to convince Marnie to take work seriously. (S9, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Geordies hit the road to host a Tash-On Tours hoedown for young farmers in Gloucestershire. \"Psycho\" Charlotte is back when she sees Gary talking to another girl. (S9, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Gary pretends to get a tattoo of Charlotte's initials behind his ear, but she freaks out and says something she regrets. Meanwhile there's drama between Aaron and Marnie. (S9, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the Geordie Shore house! But there are tears amidst the tinsel when Vicky returns with unexpected news. Kyle hopes for a special Xmas present from Holly. (S9, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1003
